# terrible_community_general_runit (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the service to manage.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the service is enabled or not, if disabled it also implies stopped.
- `service_dir` (String) Directory runsv watches for services.
- `service_src` (String) Directory where services are defined, the source of symlinks to `service_dir`.
- `state` (String) `started`/`stopped` are idempotent actions that do not run commands unless necessary. `restarted` always bounces the service (sv restart) and `killed` always bounces the service (sv force-stop). `reloaded` always sends a HUP (sv reload). `once` runs a normally downed sv once (sv once), not really an idempotent operation.
